meta.name: template-p-parallel-barrier
meta.description: TEMPLATE (P — parallel + barrier): fixed branches run at once, then a step that needs ALL their results together. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: A fixed set of independent perspectives or workstreams whose results must be merged

steps.barrierReason: <why a later step needs all branch results at once — e.g. they are merged into a single report; if you cannot say why, use a sequence instead>

branches.does: <branch 3: e.g. audit {target} for missing test coverage>

steps.does: merge {securityFindings}, {perfFindings} and {coverageFindings} into <one deduplicated, severity-ranked report>

end.review: <e.g. one merged report, deduplicated, ranked by severity>
